title: The Vatican Treaty is still in effect
display_title: The Vatican Treaty is still in effect
wikitext:
[]: The Vatican Treaty is still in effect.             Quote Post by wiser3754 » Tue Jul 16, 2019 6:37 pm During the preview, Wille bemoans that Nerv is violating the Vatican Treaty via use of Evas for military operations. Seriously, who cares? I find it pretty hypocritcal that Wille also uses Evas for military operations too. One more thing the Vatican Treaty also retstricts as pointed out by Ritsuko in 2.0 that no more than 3 Evas may be operational in one country at time. However does Unit 01 powering the Wunder count as an operational Eva alongside Unit 02 and 08? If not Wille is withing guidelines to use another Eva on top of Unit 02 and 08. Makes you wonder.

[]: Re: The Vatican Treaty is still in effect.             Quote Post by Blockio » Wed Jul 17, 2019 5:30 am I'd say that the whole point is kinda moot in general, because in the world of Q/Shin, the concept of nations hardly exists anymore

[]: Re: The Vatican Treaty is still in effect.             Quote Post by Bryan » Mon Aug 05, 2019 1:58 am It's also hardly surprising that any group would be hypocritical in how it lets another handle what basically amounts to a WMD. Imagine how the U.S. would react to Iran working on WMDs, they'd get nuked in a heartbeat.

[]: Re: The Vatican Treaty is still in effect.             Quote Post by Fredsq » Tue Aug 20, 2019 3:43 pm I think the Vatican Treaty has more clauses to it, and some involve not creating monstrosities without demi-human shapes, or giving them autonomous control. Probably something to prevent creating another species that could be harmful to mankind (like Eva Mk. 44A, that has become it’s own kind with organised swarms).

[]: Re: The Vatican Treaty is still in effect.             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Aug 20, 2019 4:13 pm I personally love how 2.22 haters were bitching about how the Vatican Treaty was “an obvious plot contrivance in order to force Mari into the story,” and now still have to deal with this piece of actual world building having real narrative integrity to the story for both Shin Eva and the series as a whole despite no longer being needed to “force Mari into the story.”

[]: Re: The Vatican Treaty is still in effect.             Quote Post by eldomtom2 » Tue Aug 20, 2019 4:19 pm That assumes this is more than a throwaway line.

[]: Re: The Vatican Treaty is still in effect.             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Wed Aug 21, 2019 6:35 am Blockio wrote: I'd say that the whole point is kinda moot in general, because in the world of Q/Shin, the concept of nations hardly exists anymore

[]: Re: The Vatican Treaty is still in effect.             Quote Post by Zoop » Wed Aug 21, 2019 6:56 am For HIP to work, they would need a sufficient amount of alive people, right? It's probably what those huge amounts of mp eva's are for (assuming they already got people in them), but still.

[]: Re: The Vatican Treaty is still in effect.             Quote Post by wiser3754 » Thu Aug 22, 2019 9:22 pm Giji Shinka wrote: Or it's possible that the line further reinforces the idea (Like a lot of things in Q) that nations/human civilizations do still exist and like Shinji, we hardly know anything about the world and we (or some people here) assume the worst.

[]: Re: The Vatican Treaty is still in effect.             Quote Post by MirrorUniverseAsuka » Thu Aug 22, 2019 11:40 pm Was it ever mentioned what the penalty for breaking the treaty would be? I could imagine it being very tempted to reply "Bitch, I have four Evas. Your move."

[]: Re: The Vatican Treaty is still in effect.             Quote Post by Blockio » Fri Aug 23, 2019 9:41 am MirrorUniverseAsuka wrote: Was it ever mentioned what the penalty for breaking the treaty would be? I could imagine it being very tempted to reply "Bitch, I have four Evas. Your move."

[]: Re: The Vatican Treaty is still in effect.             Quote Post by MirrorUniverseAsuka » Fri Aug 23, 2019 9:59 am Blockio wrote: Probably trading sanctions. You can be as op as you want, you can't punch a lack of food imports

[]: Re: The Vatican Treaty is still in effect.             Quote Post by Blockio » Fri Aug 23, 2019 10:34 am Thank you for this mental image
